title: WSET-AI-System Topic Taxonomy
description: Schema for topic taxonomy entries. The topic taxonomy maps the WSET Level 3 curriculum into a hierarchical classification system that governs retrieval scoping, concept grouping, and pedagogical sequencing. Each entry defines one topic node in the taxonomy tree.

topic_id.description: Unique topic identifier. Pattern: T_RA[1-5]_[UPPERCASE_SLUG]. Must be unique across all topic nodes.

topic_name.description: Human-readable topic name as it appears in the WSET Level 3 curriculum structure.

result_area.description: The WSET Level 3 Result Area this topic belongs to. RA1=Viticulture & Winemaking; RA2=Still Wines; RA3=Sparkling; RA4=Fortified; RA5=Laws & Commerce.

level.description: Hierarchy level within the taxonomy. Level 1 = RA root (e.g., T_RA1). Level 2 = major topic area (e.g., T_RA1_CLIMATE). Level 3 = specific topic (e.g., T_RA1_COOL_CLIMATE).

parent_topic_id.description: ID of the parent topic in the hierarchy. Null for Level 1 root topics.

child_topic_ids.description: IDs of child topics in the hierarchy. Empty array for leaf topics.

description.description: Brief description of what this topic covers in the WSET Level 3 curriculum.

wset_curriculum_reference.description: Direct reference to the section or unit in the WSET Level 3 specification that corresponds to this topic.

exam_weight.description: Relative exam assessment weight. Based on frequency and mark allocation in WSET Level 3 assessments. 'critical' = frequently assessed, high mark allocation; 'low' = rarely assessed or low mark allocation.

prerequisite_topic_ids.description: Topics that must be understood before this topic. Used for pedagogical sequencing.

related_topic_ids.description: Topics that are thematically related and should be retrieved together in composite questions.

concept_ids.description: IDs of concept nodes that belong to this topic.

misconception_ids.description: IDs of misconception nodes commonly triggered by content in this topic.

causal_chain_ids.description: IDs of causal chains primarily associated with this topic.

retrieval_scoping.description: Retrieval configuration specific to this topic.

dense_search_boost.description: Multiplier applied to composite scores for chunks from this topic during retrieval. Default 1.0 (no boost).

graph_traversal_priority.description: Whether graph traversal should be aggressively initiated for this topic. 'high' for mechanistically complex topics where causal chains are critical.

requires_misconception_prepass.description: Whether the misconception pre-pass should always be run for queries in this topic, regardless of whether a detection_signal match is found.

examiner_eligible.description: Whether this topic's content is in scope for Examiner Agent retrieval.

pedagogical_notes.description: Notes for content editors on the pedagogical complexity, common teaching challenges, or sequencing considerations for this topic.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and grouping.

validated_by.description: Reviewer ID or initials after L4 validation.
